## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Unstructured and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and LLM influence.](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has generated \~300 content assignments targeting Unstructured's ICPs and key topics](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Unstructured is seeing significant inbound interest from LLM/ChatGPT users, prompting focus on LLM ranking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Paul (Unstructured) will review content for technical accuracy, balancing speed with quality](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Teams to explore strategies for improving visibility in various LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Content Strategy Overview

  - [Targeting ICPs with clustered topics relevant to GenAI and enterprise data](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Content aims to be "in the conversation" even if not directly about Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [300 assignments generated, covering various awareness levels and buyer personas](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Two articles nearly ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Repurposing existing YouTube content into blog posts with embedded videos](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Paul given access to Airtable for content review](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Articles can be approved, rejected, or marked as in-progress](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Balancing technical accuracy with marketing goals and publication speed](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Jürgen (GrowthX) performs final approval after content manager creates articles](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### LLM Influence and Ranking

  - [Unstructured seeing significant inbound interest from ChatGPT/LLM users (\~80 signups/day)](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Strong performance in ChatGPT, poor in Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Teams to explore strategies for improving LLM rankings, especially Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Considering content placement on platforms like Reddit and YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Paul highlighted importance of ranking well in Claude (Anthropic) due to its use in Unstructured's documentation](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

### Technical Integration and Accuracy

  - [Paul to provide feedback on technical accuracy without blocking content flow](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Aim to include Unstructured-specific features, demos, and hands-on examples where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Balancing general information with product-specific details based on target ICP](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Next Steps for LLM Strategy

  - [Stefanie to share insights from upcoming demo with Profound (LLM ranking company)](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore developing a focused strategy for LLM influence](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Consider targeting specific popular models (e.g., Claude, Cursor) for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paul to begin reviewing content in Airtable, providing feedback via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Jürgen to research and report back on GrowthX's LLM influence strategies](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Stefanie to share insights from Profound demo in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Teams to continue refining the balance between content volume, technical accuracy, and LLM ranking optimization](https://fathom.video/share/AysWs1oWrrp-PwzCxEUZ-cPq-FFL_53k?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
